json_data.title: The Major
json_data.description: In a given year, the department may designate individual Musicology seminars in the range 160-185, 188, or 191 as equivalent to 126 and 127.

MUSCLG 125B - History of Western Music: Era of Empires and Marketplaces
MUSCLG 125C - History of Western Music: Modern and Postmodern Era
MUSCLG 126 - Musics, Cultures, and Their Interpretation
